title: Capital Deployment — Outstanding vs Available Funds
notes: Replaces the dropped Cash Drag chart (efficiency slot). Bars = Average Portfolio Outstanding (deployed book); line = Available Funds (lender capacity). The two cross in 2026: Available > Outstanding in Jan–Feb (idle capacity) flips to Outstanding > Available by April (book fully deployed / fully utilising the funding line) — the positive framing of cash drag. YTD only because Available Funds is reported from 2026; Outstanding has full LTM history but is clipped here so both series align.
